profile_rule: Native CDM mechanics are retained. TFII profile fields preserve financial-record authority, evidence state, Unknowns, rights, coverage and the fail-closed precondition before collateral eligibility is queried.

records.instrument_name: Franklin OnChain U.S. Government Money Fund

record_keeper.notes: Named transfer-agent entity remains to be extracted.

authoritative_record.value: Transfer-agent-maintained official ownership record across approved blockchain networks.
authoritative_record.notes: The receipt binds the filing's stated official-record architecture; legal effect is outside scope.

token_role.value: Integrated component of the official transfer-agent record.
token_role.notes: Approved-network treatment may differ by network and filing version.

ownership_effective_event.value: Transaction confirmation on the relevant approved blockchain after transfer-agent processing.
ownership_effective_event.notes: This timing is filing-specific and must not be generalized to other tokenized shares.

valuation_authority.notes: The collateral workflow's accepted valuation authority is not public

correction_authority.value: Transfer agent has correction control over erroneous or unauthorized blockchain-recorded activity.
correction_authority.notes: Exact correction mechanics and downstream propagation remain incomplete.

correction_lineage.notes: No live correction event or downstream propagation receipt is in the public sample

reconciliation.notes: Private reconciliation workpapers and exception state are unavailable

wallet_eligibility.notes: Receiver-specific wallet and holder eligibility are unavailable

TFII may cite, transform, display, and distribute bounded EDGAR-derived factual records with attribution and without implying SEC or issuer endorsement; private records, third-party data, and trademark use remain outside this basis.

processing_calendar.value: Peer-to-peer transfers may complete at any time on any day. Effective on or about 18 May 2026, a same-day purchase or sale order must be received and accepted before 2:00 p.m. Pacific time, subject to earlier-close conditions.
processing_calendar.notes: The receipt preserves separate peer-to-peer transfer, purchase, sale, and early-close boundaries.

records.instrument_name: JPMorgan OnChain Liquidity-Token Money Market Fund

record_keeper.notes: Named entity remains to be extracted.

authoritative_record.value: Offchain Investor Register maintained by the transfer agent.
authoritative_record.notes: Registered ownership is distinguished from token-transfer instruction.

token_role.value: Instruction channel for a requested transfer, not by itself the final ownership register.
token_role.notes: Exact supported network and token mechanics remain to be normalized.

ownership_effective_event.value: Transfer agent update to the offchain Investor Register.
ownership_effective_event.notes: Block inclusion alone is not treated as the ownership-effective event.

valuation_authority.notes: The collateral workflow's accepted valuation authority is not public

correction_authority.value: The Investor Register controls; subsequent blockchain transactions correct token balances after a conflict or dispute resolution.
correction_authority.notes: Downstream propagation after reversal remains unknown.

correction_lineage.notes: No live correction event or downstream propagation receipt is in the public sample

reconciliation.notes: Private reconciliation workpapers and exception state are unavailable

record_keeper.value: Invesco Investment Services, Inc. is the transfer agent; Superstate Services LLC is the sub-transfer agent maintaining the blockchain-integrated ownership record under its oversight.
record_keeper.notes: The transfer-agent and sub-transfer-agent roles are filing-specific.

authoritative_record.value: Designated blockchain records together with an offchain identity register constitute the official shareholder register, absent technical failure.
authoritative_record.notes: The technical-failure exception remains part of the observed filing boundary.

token_role.value: Designated record on which ownership and transfer are authenticated and recorded, subject to transfer-agent controls.
token_role.notes: Designated network details remain to be extracted.

ownership_effective_event.notes: The filing describes blockchain transaction requests and a joint official register but does not identify the exact event that completes a transfer.

valuation_authority.notes: The collateral workflow's accepted valuation authority is not public

correction_authority.value: Superstate under IIS oversight can maintain the allowlist and reject or suspend transfers; the transfer agent may agree to correct a fund-share transaction, but blockchain-to-register correction propagation is not stated.
correction_authority.notes: Definitive conflict hierarchy remains to be extracted.

correction_lineage.notes: No live correction event or downstream propagation receipt is in the public sample

reconciliation.notes: Private reconciliation workpapers and exception state are unavailable

wallet_eligibility.notes: Receiver-specific wallet and holder eligibility are unavailable

record_keeper.value: The Bank of New York Mellon, as Administrator and Transfer Agent
record_keeper.notes: The receipt records the named role from the filing metadata.

authoritative_record.value: Transfer agent's offchain book, stated as definitive evidence of ownership.
authoritative_record.notes: This records the filing architecture and is not an independent legal opinion.

token_role.value: Supplementary blockchain representation reconciled to the definitive offchain record.
token_role.notes: The blockchain is not treated as the controlling record in a conflict.

ownership_effective_event.value: The blockchain transfer executes first; ownership is then reflected on the Transfer Agent's books and records.
ownership_effective_event.notes: Blockchain execution and authoritative book-entry reflection remain distinct steps.

valuation_authority.notes: The collateral workflow's accepted valuation authority is not public

correction_authority.value: The definitive offchain transfer-agent record controls and can be used to correct the blockchain representation.
